author: va8e
content: Result: Workspace conversion complete. Root Cargo.toml is now a workspace with two members: crates/crossbridge (binary, existing CLI) and crates/crossbridge-protocol (library, new). Protocol crate implements Message enum (Request/Response/StatusUpdate), Status enum (with Error(String) variant), Priority enum, postcard-based to_bytes/from_bytes on Message, and length-prefixed framing (encode_frame/decode_frame/decode_all_frames with MAX_FRAME_LEN=1MiB cap). 24 tests pass (8 binary + 16 protocol). Nix derivation updated with --package crossbridge flag. clippy/fmt not available in env but code follows existing style.
